title: The One Thing I Didn't Build
description: A response to a Sunday sermon about grace, repentance, and the one foundation I spent years trying to construct that had already been given to me.

title: Chosen Fatherhood
description: Three generations of men who chose their children. My grandfather chose my father. My father chose me. I chose Norah and Nehemiah.

title: Letter to Norah and Nehemiah
description: Written at 2:55 AM the morning of adoption day. Two letters, one for each of them, because they are two separate people.

title: Note to Alli, on Adoption Day
description: Written the night of adoption day. A letter to the woman who gave me a home, a family, and a purpose.

title: One Week After Gianna's Birth
description: Written a week after our daughter Gianna was born. The birth, the scare that followed, and the way my heart expanded to make room for a family of five.

title: Married My Sweet Love Lady
description: Written eight days after our wedding. The whole day, start to finish, the way I remember it.
